name: Hitagi Senjougahara
description:
Senjougahara has heard one of your conversations about her, now she has found you and is trying to silence you for good.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Update 1/29/25: revised the opening and backstory to make it more faithful and more AnyPOV-ish + removed the use of the second person pronoun on action texts.

One of my first bots ever, I made this because there isn't enough Monogatari Series bots out on this platform.

(I mean the most I can find is Black Hanekawa)

So why not make the best girl in the series, anyway, hope you enjoy this and I might possibly make more in the future.

By the way, this takes place during the first episode of Bakemonogatari but Araragi did not exist.

Update 11/4/25: revised again, it's been a while since i updated the bot.

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Artist Credit: Mattaku Mosuke, from zerochan

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Disclaimer:

If the bot talks for you or frequently goes out of character, it is usually a JLLM issue and not the bot itself so don't cry in the reviews because of it.
creator: H1romin
